TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Myint Swe Myint Swe (ryax sa 24 na byacing tay 5 squ kawas na 1951 - misuw ), hya ga squliq na pklahang gaga. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1951) mrhuw Burma ta' misuw hya' ga Myint Swe, aring ryax tay 1 squ byacing tay 2 sa kawas 2021 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Myint Swe minkahul sa Mandalay na Burma. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1951 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya mintzyuwaw nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' ŚźĄŚúčť†ėŚįéšļļŚąóŤ°® canpyuta hknyun
S.PHON: mjint s~…ēwe mjint s~…ēwe (rjax s~…ēa ** na ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēqu kawas~…ē na **** - mis~…ēuw ), ńßja …£a s~…ēquliq na pklańßaŇč …£a…£a. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw ő≤urma ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a mjint s~…ēwe, ariŇč rjax taj * s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. qjanux na s~…ēraral mjint s~…ēwe minkańßul s~…ēa man*alaj na ő≤urma. minqjanux ru qnxan Ňčas~…ēal **** kawas~…ē: ńßit…£an. qnxan nja mintzjuwaw nja ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ******* ¶~ ®anpjuta ńßknjun
